title: Manifest
html:
October 2021 freshman-year Yahir manifesto at OSU: "Learning a great skill (by end of school). Getting pussy (end of term). Meeting great people (everyday)." Capped by the founding-attitude line "I have nothing to lose, thus be brave enough to try."

TL;DR

  • 18-year-old Yahir hard-coding three OSU goals (skill, sex, network) with explicit timelines.
  • The "nothing to lose, thus brave" line is a clean restatement of fear of not doing — the engine in plain language.
  • Sits in the same manifesto cluster as 2020 12 05 if you dont take risk you wont win and 2021 09 08 grip the juice out of life.

yahir gonzalez · osu · fear of not doing · manifesto style note · voluntary adversity

related.label: Grip the juice out of life
If you don't take risk you won't win
